title: The Doo
description: A hair-raising film. It seemed like a harmless hairstyle until it began to crave… raw flesh.
altHero: a woman stands by a man in the park, his huge hair making the shape of hand
alt1: woman and man in the park
alt2: woman screaming as a hair hand reaches for her
alt4: the man’s hair has swallowed the woman, only her feet sticking out
